quicksight.topic.defaultformatting.CfnAb: A structure that represents a default formatting definition.

quicksight.topic.defaultformatting.Displ.Description: The display format. Valid values for this structure are `AUTO`, `PERCENT`, `CURRENCY`, `NUMBER`, `DATE`, and `STRING`.
quicksight.topic.defaultformatting.Displ.Allowed values: AUTO | CURRENCY | DATE | NUMBER | PERCENT | STRING

quicksight.topic.defaultformatting.Displ.Description: The additional options for display formatting.
